message:
fix(cache): guard against zero/small TTL causing ticker panic

NewCache(ttl) would pass ttl/2 to time.NewTicker which panics if the
duration is <= 0. This could happen if ttl was 0 or 1 nanosecond.

Add DefaultCacheTTL (5 minutes) for when ttl <= 0 is passed, and
MinCacheTTL (2 milliseconds) to ensure ttl/2 is always positive.

This follows the same defensive pattern used in watcher/debouncer.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
